x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Campus configuration provides the location hierarchy Now Assist WSD uses for AI-powered location-aware space recommendations. Without campus structure, AI cannot filter space recommendations by employee location or proximity preferences.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function() { var ga = new GlideAggregate("sn_wsd_core_campus"); ga.addAggregate("COUNT"); ga.query(); var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; if (count >= 3) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: count + " campus records configured", finding: count + " campuses configured. Now Assist WSD has structured location hierarchy for AI-powered location-aware space recommendations." }; } else if (count >= 1) { return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: count + " campus record(s) configured", finding: "Only " + count + " campus configured (target: 3+). Now Assist WSD AI location-based recommendations may have limited geographic coverage." }; } else { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: "No campus records configured", finding: "No campuses configured. Now Assist WSD cannot provide location-aware AI space recommendations without campus structure." }; } })
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure campus records for each physical location in Workplace Core. Navigate to Workplace Service Delivery > Administration > Campuses to create campus records.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_5ff89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c63
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Campus configuration provides the location hierarchy Now Assist WSD uses for AI-powered location-aware space recommendations. Without campus structure, AI cannot filter space recommendations by employee location or proximity preferences.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Campus Configuration</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function() { var ga = new GlideAggregate("sn_wsd_core_campus"); ga.addAggregate("COUNT"); ga.query(); var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; if (count >= 3) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: count + " campus records configured", finding: count + " campuses configured. Now Assist WSD has structured location hierarchy for AI-powered location-aware space recommendations." }; } else if (count >= 1) { return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: count + " campus record(s) configured", finding: "Only " + count + " campus configured (target: 3+). Now Assist WSD AI location-based recommendations may have limited geographic coverage." }; } else { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: "No campus records configured", finding: "No campuses configured. Now Assist WSD cannot provide location-aware AI space recommendations without campus structure." }; } })]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>WSD</module><number>CHK0000602</number><order>500</order><remediation_guidance>Configure campus records for each physical location in Workplace Core. Navigate to Workplace Service Delivery > Administration > Campuses to create campus records.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:21</sys_created_on><sys_id>5ff89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c63</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Campus Configuration</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_5ff89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c63</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
